package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_logger_with_fields_per_request: Layer: Logging overhead. Flag derived logger construction per request when stable fields can be attached once.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule562NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario562Negative(records []Rule562NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
